title: Governor Newsom Vetoes Senate Bill 298 on Maritime Emissions Reduction
content: Governor Gavin Newsom has vetoed Senate Bill 298, citing concerns over its potential unintended consequences and the need for further refinement. In his veto message, Newsom highlighted ambiguities in the billâ€™s language and possible overlaps with existing legislation that could lead to confusion or conflicting interpretations. He emphasized the importance of ensuring that new laws do not disrupt established policies or create unnecessary complexities in implementation. The bill is now pending in the Senate, where additional revisions and clarifications are expected before it may be reconsidered for passage.
author: Analysts Account
source: Office of the Governor of California
